name: Social Connection Catalyst
description: Strengthen your social relationships and build meaningful connections with this 21-day program that combines communication skills, active listening techniques, and relationship-building strategies.

steps.title: Social Inventory
steps.description: Assess your current social connections and identify areas for growth
steps.content: Map out your social network and evaluate relationship quality

steps.title: Communication Skills
steps.description: Learn effective communication techniques for better interactions
steps.content: Practice active listening and clear expression skills
